info.description: Filtered OpenAPI description for the stateless synchronous Alibaba Cloud PAI Model Gallery proxy. The gateway serves only the allowlisted operations defined in the paired YAML manifest.
info.title: Alibaba Cloud PAI Model Gallery API

parameters.description: Page number for the Model List. The starting value is 1, and the default value is 1.
parameters.name: PageNumber

schema.description: Page number for the Model List. The starting value is 1, and the default value is 1.

parameters.description: The number of models displayed per page in a paged query. The default value is 10.
parameters.name: PageSize

schema.description: The number of models displayed per page in a paged query. The default value is 10.

parameters.description:
Specifies ascending or descending order for the designated sorting field during a paged query. The default value is ASC.  

ASC: ascending order.  
DESC: descending order.
parameters.name: Order

schema.description:
Specifies ascending or descending order for the designated sorting field during a paged query. The default value is ASC.  

ASC: ascending order.  
DESC: descending order.

parameters.description:
The field used for sorting in a paged query. Currently, the GmtCreateTime field is used for sorting. Supported values include:

- GmtCreateTime: Creation Time of the model

- GmtLatestVersionModified: Update Time of the latest model version

- OrderNumber: Ordinal number
parameters.name: SortBy

schema.description:
The field used for sorting in a paged query. Currently, the GmtCreateTime field is used for sorting. Supported values include:

- GmtCreateTime: Creation Time of the model

- GmtLatestVersionModified: Update Time of the latest model version

- OrderNumber: Ordinal number

parameters.description: The model name used for configuration. By default, a fuzzy match is applied to retrieve the model list. Enclose the name in double quotes for an exact match. For example, specifying "DeepSeek-V3.2" performs an exact match for the model DeepSeek-V3.2.
parameters.name: ModelName

schema.description: The model name used for configuration. By default, a fuzzy match is applied to retrieve the model list. Enclose the name in double quotes for an exact match. For example, specifying "DeepSeek-V3.2" performs an exact match for the model DeepSeek-V3.2.

parameters.description: Specify a domain to filter the Model List within that domain. For example: aigc (generative AI), nlp (natural language processing), cv (computer vision), and so on.
parameters.name: Domain

schema.description: Specify a domain to filter the Model List within that domain. For example: aigc (generative AI), nlp (natural language processing), cv (computer vision), and so on.

parameters.description: Job. For example: large-language-model, image-classification, embedding, etc.
parameters.name: Task

schema.description: Job. For example: large-language-model, image-classification, embedding, etc.

parameters.description: Configure the model source to filter the model list belonging to a specific community or organization, such as ModelScope, PAI, NIM, etc.
parameters.name: Origin

schema.description: Configure the model source to filter the model list belonging to a specific community or organization, such as ModelScope, PAI, NIM, etc.

parameters.description: Model type.
parameters.name: ModelType

schema.description: Model type.

parameters.description: The collection to which the model belongs. Models in ModelGallery belong to the QuickStart collection.
parameters.name: Collections

schema.description: The collection to which the model belongs. Models in ModelGallery belong to the QuickStart collection.

parameters.description:
Model series.  
PAI Optimized Model, Qwen, Wan-AI, GLM, Baichuan, DeepSeek, Kimi, MiniMax, Yi, InternLM, InternVL, OpenAI, NVIDIA, Gemma, Phi, dots_vlm, Llama, Mistral, Stable Diffusion, FLUX, Byte Dance, StepFun AI, ERNIE Bot, Tencent Hunyuan, YOLO, etc.
parameters.name: ModelSeries

schema.description:
Model series.  
PAI Optimized Model, Qwen, Wan-AI, GLM, Baichuan, DeepSeek, Kimi, MiniMax, Yi, InternLM, InternVL, OpenAI, NVIDIA, Gemma, Phi, dots_vlm, Llama, Mistral, Stable Diffusion, FLUX, Byte Dance, StepFun AI, ERNIE Bot, Tencent Hunyuan, YOLO, etc.

parameters.description: Indicates whether online experience is supported.
parameters.name: Demonstrable

schema.description: Indicates whether online experience is supported.

parameters.description: Indicates whether deployment is supported.
parameters.name: Deployable

schema.description: Indicates whether deployment is supported.

parameters.description: Supported deployment resources, such as CPU, GPU, GP7V, etc. For example, if GP7V is specified, the filter returns models that support deployment on GP7V resources.
parameters.name: SupportedInferenceResource

schema.description: Supported deployment resources, such as CPU, GPU, GP7V, etc. For example, if GP7V is specified, the filter returns models that support deployment on GP7V resources.

parameters.description: Indicates whether training is supported.
parameters.name: Trainable

schema.description: Indicates whether training is supported.

parameters.description: Supported training resources, such as CPU, GPU, GP7V, etc. For example, if GP7V is specified, filter models that support GP7V for training.
parameters.name: SupportedTrainingResource

schema.description: Supported training resources, such as CPU, GPU, GP7V, etc. For example, if GP7V is specified, filter models that support GP7V for training.

parameters.description: Indicates whether evaluation is supported.
parameters.name: Evaluable

schema.description: Indicates whether evaluation is supported.

parameters.description: Supported evaluation resources, such as CPU, GPU, GP7V, etc. For example, if GP7V is specified, the filter returns models that support evaluation on GP7V resources.
parameters.name: SupportedEvaluationResource

schema.description: Supported evaluation resources, such as CPU, GPU, GP7V, etc. For example, if GP7V is specified, the filter returns models that support evaluation on GP7V resources.

parameters.description: Indicates whether compression is supported.
parameters.name: Compressible

schema.description: Indicates whether compression is supported.

parameters.description: Supported compression resources, such as CPU, GPU, GP7V, etc. If GP7V is specified, only models that support compression on GP7V resources are filtered.
parameters.name: SupportedCompressionResource

schema.description: Supported compression resources, such as CPU, GPU, GP7V, etc. If GP7V is specified, only models that support compression on GP7V resources are filtered.

parameters.description: Indicates whether distillation is supported.
parameters.name: Distillable

schema.description: Indicates whether distillation is supported.

parameters.description: Supported distillation resources, such as CPU, GPU, GP7V, etc. If GP7V is specified, only models that support distillation on GP7V resources are filtered.
parameters.name: SupportedDistillationResource

schema.description: Supported distillation resources, such as CPU, GPU, GP7V, etc. If GP7V is specified, only models that support distillation on GP7V resources are filtered.

parameters.description: Indicates whether deep thinking is supported.
parameters.name: DeepThink

schema.description: Indicates whether deep thinking is supported.

parameters.description: Indicates whether FunctionCall is supported.
parameters.name: FunctionCall

schema.description: Indicates whether FunctionCall is supported.

parameters.description: List of tags.
parameters.name: Tag

schema.description: List of tags.

parameters.description: List of conditions.
parameters.name: Conditions

schema.description: List of conditions.

Column.description: Parameter Name. Supported values include ParameterSize, in MB.

Value.description: Value. If Column is ParameterSize, enter an integer in MB.

parameters.description: Configure query conditions. Performs fuzzy match on multiple fields such as ModelName, Domain, and Task.
parameters.name: Query

schema.description: Configure query conditions. Performs fuzzy match on multiple fields such as ModelName, Domain, and Task.
